title: VNC-6849P
tags: dogespalace italia italy palazzoducale venezia venice art museum painting veneto
description: We visited the Doge’s Palace on the last day of our two week adventure across Italy in October of 2024. The Palace is located in St. Mark's Square and is one of the main landmarks of the city of Venice, featuring the most grand rooms filled with grand paintings and the most grandly ornate gold gilt framed ceilings imaginable. It is built in Venetian Gothic style, and housed government offices, a jail, and the residence of the Doge of Venice, the elected authority of the former Republic of Venice. Shown here in a panorama to help capture the grandness of this place. Please see the album description and related albums for more about the overall trip. This is album # 4 of 4, Venice.

title: Gondola after dark #14
description:
Venice, Italy.

Carolyn and I were on a cruise which stopped in Venice. The tour offered an optional "after dark" gondola ride. 

Tips for future travelers: 
1. Take your ride in the daytime. It is just as "romantic", you can actually see, and you don't dwell on the smells on the lesser, still water canals.
2. Arrange your own ride. The price will easily be less for a private ride as opposed to what you pay for an "arranged" ride with at least one more couple.

title: Twi'lek (Harlequin Carnival Mask), Venice
tags: ca carnival venice italy sol del mask venezia artisan harlequin twilek uploaded:by=flickrmobile flickriosapp:filter=nofilter
description: This is taken in the wonderful Ca' del Sol mask makers in Venice. It's an incredible shop, with wonderful photographer friendly owners. I'd recommend a visit to anyone and everyone, especially if you want to take pictures. www.cadelsolmascherevenezia.com/en/masks/. I found out on this visit that they do tours of their workshop - definitely something I will try to book ahead of our next visit. Hope everyone is looking forward to a fantastic Christmas if they're celebrating it!
